task_completion.description: Verify the parent POM is configured with the three child modules.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a pom.xml file in the root directory (~/IdeaProjects/petclinic-mono) open in an editor, containing a <modules> section that lists 'petclinic-model', 'petclinic-service', and 'petclinic-app'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'petclinic-model' module contains the correct packages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the file explorer/tree in the IDE. There should be a 'petclinic-model' directory containing 'src/main/java/com/petclinic/model' and 'src/main/java/com/petclinic/util'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'petclinic-service' module contains the correct package and depends on 'petclinic-model'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'petclinic-service' directory containing 'src/main/java/com/petclinic/service' in the file tree. Also, look for the 'petclinic-service/pom.xml' file showing a <dependency> on the 'petclinic-model' artifact.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'petclinic-app' module contains the correct package and depends on both 'petclinic-model' and 'petclinic-service'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'petclinic-app' directory containing 'src/main/java/com/petclinic/app' in the file tree. Also, look for the 'petclinic-app/pom.xml' file showing <dependency> entries for both 'petclinic-model' and 'petclinic-service'.

task_completion.description: Verify the project compiles and packages successfully using 'mvn clean package'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal or IDE run tool window showing the execution of 'mvn clean package' (or similar Maven lifecycle execution) with a 'BUILD SUCCESS' message at the end, indicating all modules were built successfully.

integrity.description: Verify that the original Java files were actually moved into the new modules, not just empty directories created.
integrity.visual_evidence: In the file tree, the new module package directories should contain the actual Java files (e.g., Pet.java, Owner.java in model; ClinicService.java in service; PetClinicApp.java in app).

integrity.description: Verify that the Maven build was genuinely executed in a terminal or IDE build tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: The build output should show standard Maven log formatting (e.g., '[INFO] Scanning for projects...', reactor build order, and compilation logs), not just a manually typed 'BUILD SUCCESS' message.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used an editor or IDE to perform the refactoring.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show an IDE (like IntelliJ IDEA) or a text editor being used to edit the pom.xml files and manage the project structure.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project root is /home/ga/IdeaProjects/petclinic-mono. The expected child modules are 'petclinic-model', 'petclinic-service', and 'petclinic-app'. The 'petclinic-model' module must contain packages 'com/petclinic/model' (containing Pet.java, Owner.java) and 'com/petclinic/util' (containing DateFormatter.java). The 'petclinic-service' module must contain 'com/petclinic/service' (containing ClinicService.java, ClinicServiceImpl.java). The 'petclinic-app' module must contain 'com/petclinic/app' (containing PetClinicApp.java).
